projectDescription: Open source compliance platform for achieving SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, and other regulatory certifications with built-in risk management, vendor tracking, policy documents, and a public trust center.
keyFeatures: Compliance frameworks for SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA, ISO27701, ISO42001
Risk register with inherent and residual scoring
Vendor management with risk assessments and compliance reports
Policy and document management with version control and approval workflows
Evidence collection linked to measures and controls
Public-facing Trust Center with custom domain support
Role-based access control (Owner, Admin, Employee, Viewer, Auditor)
SAML SSO and SCIM user provisioning
AI-assisted automation via MCP (Model Context Protocol)
CLI tool (prb) for managing compliance resources programmatically
GraphQL API for all platform resources
DPIA and Transfer Impact Assessments for GDPR compliance
publicApiSurface: GraphQL API: console/v1 (organizations, vendors, risks, measures, frameworks, controls, documents, evidence, audits, assets)

MCP API: listVendors, addVendor, updateVendor, deleteVendor, listRisks, addRisk, updateRisk, deleteRisk, listMeasures, addMeasure, updateMeasure, listFrameworks, listUsers, createUser, updateUser, inviteUser
CLI: prb auth, prb org, prb risk, prb control, prb framework, prb evidence, prb user, prb finding, prb soa, prb webhook
REST: /api/console/v1 (authn, authz, files, connectors), /api/mcp/v1 (MCP over HTTP), /api/connect/v1 (SCIM), /api/trust/v1 (trust center)
